name: Implementation Gap Audit - Backstory Starter
description: Audits a workflow request or customer stack against the current library to identify validated assets, recipe-only layers, and remaining productization gaps.

nodes.name: Implementation Audit Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a workflow request plus current stack details for a customer, pilot, or internal implementation review.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters

assignments.name: supportedOrchestrators
assignments.value: n8n, Make, Power Automate, Zapier, Workato, custom code

nodes.notes: Keep scoring preferences and backlog destinations configurable so the audit can be reused by solutions, product, or engineering.

nodes.name: Normalize Coverage Request
nodes.notes: Convert customer-specific intake language into a stable assessment object the audit logic can score consistently.

nodes.name: Score Productization Gaps

options.systemMessage: You are an implementation gap analysis assistant that turns one-off requests into reusable productization backlogs.

nodes.notes: Use this step to classify coverage rather than jumping straight to a custom build plan.

nodes.name: Deliver Gap Audit
nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, Jira, Linear, or another backlog destination. Keep the final scorecard and next-step recommendation attached.
